svg.title: Synalux POS — reopen check
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for reopen check. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Reopen Closed Check — Order #2406-089 · Table 4 · Closed 6:14 PM · $52.64 charged
Manager action required · Changes logged to audit trail · Customer may be notified · Payment remains captured until refund is issued
Table 4 · Dine-In · Closed 6:14 PM · Server: Marcus
Visa ••••4242 · Auth: A8K92L · Stripe charge: ch_xyz789
Caesar Salad was priced at $14 but menu shows $12.
Customer called to report the discrepancy.
• Payment remains captured — NOT reversed automatically
• Staff can: add / remove / modify items, correct prices
• After correction: issue refund for difference ($2.00 + tax)
• If amount increased: collect additional payment separately
• Cannot: change payment method for already-settled amount
• Reopened check expires in 2 hours — then auto-closes with manager alert
Manager PIN required to reopen this check
Reopened check expires: 2 hours after reopening (then auto-closes + manager alert)
Logs to audit trail. Customer may be notified of the change and any resulting refund.
REOPENED — changes require reconciliation payment or refund
Items $39.00 → items now $39.00, tax recalc $2.48, tip $8.00
N/A — difference is negative (customer owed refund)
Order #2406-089 reopened by Dmitri — Reason: Pricing Error
pos_orders.status: open → closed → reopened → closed · pos_order_reopen_log: order_id, reopened_by, reason, reopened_at, reclosed_at, delta_cents
RLS: only manager+ role can SET status='reopened' · Reopened order timer: cron checks for expired reopened orders (>2h) → auto-close + manager alert
If additional payment needed: new pos_payments row (same order_id) · If refund: pos_refunds row + Stripe refunds.create()
All changes logged in pos_audit_log with actor, timestamp, delta_cents, stripe_ref · Customer notification: email/SMS if Stripe refund issued
pos_payments: amount, status, stripe_charge_id · pos_refunds: order_id, amount_cents, stripe_ref, issued_by, issued_at · pos_audit_log: entity_id, actor_id, action, metadata JSONB, created_at
